functions.name: addStripe
functions.description: Adds the Stripe CLI to the application model for local webhook forwarding.

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: The parameter builder providing the Stripe API key.

functions.name: setWebhookSigningSecret
functions.description: Gets the webhook signing secret retrieved from the Stripe CLI.

functions.name: webhookSigningSecret
functions.description: Gets the webhook signing secret retrieved from the Stripe CLI.

functions.name: withApiKey
functions.description: Configures the Stripe CLI to use a specific API key from a parameter.

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: The parameter containing the Stripe API key to use.

functions.name: withListen
functions.description: Configures the Stripe CLI to listen for webhooks and forward them to the specified URL expression.
functions.signature: withListen(forwardTo: IResourceWithEndpoints, webhookPath?: string, events?: string[]): StripeResource

parameters.name: forwardTo
parameters.description: The resource to forward webhooks to.

parameters.name: webhookPath
parameters.description: The path to the webhook endpoint.

parameters.name: events
parameters.description: Optional collection of specific webhook events to listen for (e.g., ["payment_intent.created", "charge.succeeded"]). If not specified, all events are forwarded.

functions.name: withListenExternalService
functions.description: Configures the Stripe CLI to listen for webhooks and forward them to the specified URL expression.
functions.signature: withListenExternalService(forwardTo: ExternalServiceResource, webhookPath?: string, events?: string[]): StripeResource

parameters.name: forwardTo
parameters.description: The resource to forward webhooks to.

parameters.name: webhookPath
parameters.description: The path to the webhook endpoint.

parameters.name: events
parameters.description: Optional collection of specific webhook events to listen for (e.g., ["payment_intent.created", "charge.succeeded"]). If not specified, all events are forwarded.

functions.name: withStripeReference
functions.description: Adds a reference to a Stripe CLI resource for accessing its webhook signing secret.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The Stripe CLI resource to reference.

parameters.name: webhookSigningSecretEnvVarName
parameters.description: Optional environment variable name to use for the webhook signing secret. Defaults to "STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET".

handleTypes.name: StripeResource
handleTypes.description: Represents a Stripe CLI container resource for local webhook forwarding and testing.
